author: Nick Kovalsky
name: .NET MAUI + Rust
description: A .NET MAUI app with a Rust native library integrated via MSBuild. Rust builds automatically with F5 — Windows, Android, iOS, and MacCatalyst.

manualInstructions.text:
Before building, verify prerequisites are installed:
  Windows:        .\check-prerequisites.ps1
  macOS / Linux:  chmod +x check-prerequisites.sh && ./check-prerequisites.sh

See Prerequisites.md for full setup details.
Required: .NET 10 + MAUI workloads, Rust (rustup), platform targets, MSVC (Windows), NDK (Android).
